title: BEM-544 live Telegram sender v2
objective:
Run script:
"""
scripts = Path('scripts')
scripts.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
workflows = Path('.github/workflows')
workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

sender = scripts / 'telegram_outbox_sender.py'
sender_lines = [
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'import os',
'import sys',
'import urllib.parse',
'import urllib.request',
'from pathlib import Path',
'',
'OUTBOX = Path("governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl")',
'TRANSPORT = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'STATE = Path("governance/state/contour_status.json")',
'',
'def load_jsonl(path):',
'    rows = []',
'    if not path.exists():',
'        return rows',
'    for line_no, line in enumerate(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").splitlines(), start=1):',
'        if not line.strip():',
'            continue',
'        try:',
'            rows.append((line_no, json.loads(line)))',
'        except Exception:',
'            rows.append((line_no, {"record_type": "invalid_jsonl", "raw": line[:500]}))',
'    return rows',
'',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:',
'        f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n")',
'',
'def stable_message_hash(text):',
'    total = 0',
'    for ch in text:',
'        total = (total * 131 + ord(ch)) % 1000000007',
'    return "len_" + str(len(text)) + "_sum_" + str(total)',
'',
'def already_delivered(line_no, message_hash, delivery_rows):',
'    for _, rec in delivery_rows:',
'        if rec.get("record_type") != "telegram_delivery_result":',
'            continue',
'        if rec.get("outbox_line") == line_no and rec.get("message_hash") == message_hash and rec.get("status") in ["sent", "sent_synthetic"]:',
'            return True',
'    return False',
'',
'def send_telegram(token, chat_id, message):',
'    url = "https://api.telegram.org/bot" + token + "/sendMessage"',
'    payload = urllib.parse.urlencode({"chat_id": chat_id, "text": message, "disable_web_page_preview": "true"}).encode()',
'    req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=payload, method="POST")',
'    try:',
'        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:',
'            body = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")[:1000]',
'            if 200 <= resp.status < 300:',
'                return True, None',
'            return False, "telegram_http_" + str(resp.status) + ": " + body',
'    except Exception as exc:',
'        return False, str(exc)[:500]',
'',
'def main():',
'    token = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", "").strip()',
'    chat_id = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID", "").strip()',
'    dry_run = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_DRY_RUN", "false").lower() in ["1", "true", "yes"]',
'    outbox_rows = load_jsonl(OUTBOX)',
'    transport_rows = load_jsonl(TRANSPORT)',
'    candidates = []',
'    for line_no, rec in outbox_rows:',
'        if rec.get("status") not in ["queued_for_sender", "queued"]:',
'            continue',
'        message = str(rec.get("message", "")).strip()',
'        if not message:',
'            continue',
'        msg_hash = stable_message_hash(message)',
'        if already_delivered(line_no, msg_hash, transport_rows):',
'            continue',
'        candidates.append((line_no, rec, msg_hash))',
'    sent = 0',
'    failed = 0',
'    for line_no, rec, msg_hash in candidates:',
'        message = str(rec.get("message", ""))',
'        if dry_run:',
'            ok = True',
'            error = None',
'            status = "sent_synthetic"',
'        elif not token or not chat_id:',
'            ok = False',
'            error = "TELEGRAM_RUNTIME_SECRET_MISSING: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN or TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID is empty"',
'            status = "failed"',
'        else:',
'            ok, error = send_telegram(token, chat_id, message)',
'            status = "sent" if ok else "failed"',
'        if ok:',
'            sent += 1',
'        else:',
'            failed += 1',
'        delivery = {',
'            "record_type": "telegram_delivery_result",',
'            "cycle_id": rec.get("cycle_id", "telegram-outbox-live"),',
'            "source": "telegram_sender",',
'            "from_role": "telegram_sender",',
'            "to_role": "curator",',
'            "status": status,',
'            "outbox_line": line_no,',
'            "message_hash": msg_hash,',
'            "attempt": 1,',
'            "retry_allowed": not ok,',
'            "next_retry_at": None if ok else "next_hour",',
'            "artifact_path": "governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl",',
'            "commit_sha": None,',
'            "blocker": None if ok else {"code": "TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_FAILED", "message": error},',
'            "created_at": os.environ.get("BEM_TIMESTAMP", "workflow_runtime"),',
'        }',
'        append_jsonl(TRANSPORT, delivery)',
'    state = {}',
'    if STATE.exists():',
'        try:',
'            state = json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            state = {}',
'    state["telegram_sender_last_run"] = {"sent": sent, "failed": failed, "candidates": len(candidates), "dry_run": dry_run, "runtime_token_present": bool(token), "runtime_chat_id_present": bool(chat_id), "updated_at": os.environ.get("BEM_TIMESTAMP", "workflow_runtime")}',
'    STATE.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\\n", encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps(state["telegram_sender_last_run"], ensure_ascii=False))',
'    return 0',
'',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    sys.exit(main())',
]
sender.write_text('\n'.join(sender_lines) + '\n')

wf = workflows / 'telegram-outbox-sender.yml'
wf_lines = [
'name: Telegram Outbox Sender',
'',
'on:',
'  workflow_dispatch:',
'    inputs:',
'      dry_run:',
'        description: Send synthetic delivery_result without calling Telegram API',
'        required: false',
'        default: "false"',
'        type: choice',
'        options:',
'          - "false"',
'          - "true"',
'',
'permissions:',
'  contents: write',
'',
'jobs:',
'  send:',
'    name: Send Telegram outbox',
'    runs-on: ubuntu-latest',
'    steps:',
'      - uses: actions/checkout@v4',
'      - name: Send queued Telegram messages',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        env:',
'          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}',
'          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}',
'          TELEGRAM_DRY_RUN: ${{ inputs.dry_run }}',
'          BEM_TIMESTAMP: "2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3)"',
'        run: python3 scripts/telegram_outbox_sender.py',
'      - name: Commit delivery results',
'        continue-on-error: true',
'        run: |',
'          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"',
'          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"',
'          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/contour_status.json',
'          git commit -m "Telegram outbox delivery result" || echo "No changes"',
'          git push',
]
wf.write_text('\n'.join(wf_lines) + '\n')

protocol = protocols / 'TELEGRAM_LIVE_SETUP_OPERATOR_ACTIONS.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-544 | Telegram Live Setup Operator Actions\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3)\n\n## Что сделано в репозитории\n- `scripts/telegram_outbox_sender.py` читает `governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl`.\n- `.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml` запускает sender через workflow_dispatch.\n- Sender пишет `telegram_delivery_result` в `governance/transport/results.jsonl`.\n- Токены не пишутся в файлы.\n\n## Что нужно от оператора\nОператор НЕ должен присылать токен в чат. Нужно добавить значения в GitHub Actions Secrets:\n\n| Secret | Значение | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| `TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` | token бота от BotFather | Нужен Telegram API runtime |\n| `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` | id чата/канала/группы для отчётов | Нужен адрес доставки |\n\n## Live PASS\nWorkflow `Telegram Outbox Sender` с `dry_run=false` должен записать `telegram_delivery_result.status=sent`.\n')

queued = {'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report','cycle_id':'bem544-live-telegram-sender','delivery_mode':'telegram-outbox-sender.yml','canonical':True,'status':'queued_for_sender','message':'BEM-544 live Telegram sender ready | 2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3) | blocker depends on runtime secrets','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3)','blocker':None,'security':'no token in file; runtime secrets only'}
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(queued, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    transport_record = dict(queued)
    transport_record['record_type'] = 'telegram_live_sender_ready'
    transport_record['artifact_path'] = 'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl'
    transport_record['commit_sha'] = None
    f.write(json.dumps(transport_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour = {}
if state_path.exists():
    try:
        contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text())
    except Exception:
        contour = {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3)'
contour['telegram_live_sender'] = {'implementation':'scripts/telegram_outbox_sender.py','workflow':'.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml','required_runtime_secrets':['TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN','TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID'],'status':'repo_side_ready_waiting_runtime_secrets','blocker':'RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND'}
contour['blocker'] = {'code':'RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND','message':'Add TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID to GitHub Actions Secrets; do not store in files.'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports / 'bem544_live_telegram_sender_implementation.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-544 | Live Telegram Sender Implementation | REPO-SIDE READY\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:33 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Создан sender script: `scripts/telegram_outbox_sender.py`.\n- Создан workflow: `.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml`.\n- Создан operator setup guide: `governance/protocols/TELEGRAM_LIVE_SETUP_OPERATOR_ACTIONS.md`.\n- Добавлен queued test message в `governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl`.\n\n## Runtime requirements\n| Secret | Required | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN | yes | Telegram Bot API token |\n| TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID | yes | Destination for canonical reports |\n\n## Blocker\n`RUNTIME_SECRETS_REQUIRED_FOR_LIVE_SEND` до добавления GitHub Actions Secrets.\n')

proof = proofs / 'bem544_live_telegram_sender_impl_v2.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-544 repo-side live Telegram sender implemented. Runtime blocker: GitHub Actions Secrets TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID required.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(sender), str(wf), str(protocol), str(outbox), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-544 implemented repo-side Telegram live sender using runtime secrets only')
"""
No issue comments.
